sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: I need to check the current state and advance one more time. I'm going in circles but I need to figure out what the goal actually is. Let me check if there's a magenta center and advance the chain.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ('M', 'p', 'G', 'W', 'w'):
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if node['pixels'] >= 5 or node['color'] == 'M':
            print(f"  color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, center~({(min(rows)+max(rows))//2},{(min(cols)+max(cols))//2})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
